raw_source_reread_reason: The parent batch already preserved the single deterministic proof witness, the local-evidence-without-admission limit, the gated executable witness contract, the explicit noncommutation and Bell mixedness witnesses, the narrow trace-preservation probe, and the hygiene-only residual boundary.
reasons_for_candidate_status: The proof family is the next bounded residual step after the mega diagnostic-strip reduction and remains cleanly one-file.
Its value depends on preserving executable witness structure rather than converting it into prose-only proof language.
Its Bell mixedness and noncommutation witnesses are reusable only if they stay explicit and source-bound.
Its channel section is reusable only if trace-preservation scope stays narrow and hygiene-only nonclosure remains visible.
reasons_for_quarantine: Local proof emission is not treated as catalog or top-level evidence-pack admission.
Deterministic proof framing is not allowed to erase the conditional evidence gate.
The Bell-state section is not flattened into generic entanglement prose.
The depolarizing probe is not promoted into broader dynamics proof.
Proof-family completion is not treated as total sims-side residual completion.
